title: conyza scariosa
intro: Conyza scariosa, also known as fleabane, is a type of annual herb that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the Americas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Conyza scariosa include reducing inflammation and pain, promoting wound healing, and treating digestive problems, as well as being used as a natural remedy for fever and colds. Conyza scariosa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in topical applications, such as salves and creams, to treat skin conditions and wounds.
